subcodes.first_line: All praise belongeth unto the Sovereign Lord Who, through His Name, the All-Powerful, hath raised aloft the Standard of Divine Unity upon the highest heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مخصوص مالک الملکیست که باسم مقتدرش علم توحیدرا بر اعلی الاعلام مرتفع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @personal instructions
